title: Bridge Essay: Absorption and spiritual experience: A review of evidence and potential mechanis

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Liberation and enlightenment — ego dissolution, self-transcendence, psychedelic-induced mystical experience, spiritual awakening, enlightenment neuroscience.

**Absorption and spiritual experience: Areview of evidence and potential mechanisms.** — Conscious Cogn. PMID: 31228696. DOI: 10.1016/j.concog.2019.05.008. Some people seem to have a 'talent' for spiritual experience: they readily sense the presence of supernatural beings, receive special messages from God, and report intense feelings of self-transcendence, awe and wonder. Here we review converging strands of evidence to argue that the trait of 'absorption' captures ageneral proclivity for having spiritual experiences.
